detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DL._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DL.sol#663-787):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (DL.sol#727)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DL.sol#801-813)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (DL.sol#733)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (DL.sol#821)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DL.sol#785)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (DL.sol#947)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (DL.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (DL.sol#929)
	DL._rOwned (DL.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DL._takeTeam(uint256) (DL.sol#941-949)
	- DL._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (DL.sol#901-937)
	- DL.balanceOf(address) (DL.sol#489-493)
	- DL.constructor() (DL.sol#423-453)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DL.sol#785)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (DL.sol#955)
	DL._rTotal (DL.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DL._getCurrentSupply() (DL.sol#1097-1107)
	- DL._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (DL.sol#953-959)
	- DL.constructor() (DL.sol#423-453)
	- DL.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (DL.sol#585-607)
detectors.markdown:
